```json
      "id": "DAY1-007",

      "category": "Lifestyle",
      "text": "Just finished my first marathon! My legs are like jelly, but the feeling of crossing that finish line was incredible. So proud of myself.",

      ],

      "correctEscalationReason": ""

  ]
}
```
